untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Verification of established seasonal trend direction using 20-bar comparison — no seasonal/cyclical indicators available; (2) Detection of pullback within 3-5 bar window against trend — requires look-back logic not supported by basic operators; (3) Counter-trend move within ±10 day seasonal reversal window — requires seasonal calendar data not in indicator set. Translated entry/exit using close vs sma_20 as proxy for trend direction and RSI extremes as proxy for counter-trend reversals, but this does not capture the core seasonal pattern mechanics.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (LONG on seasonal uptrends with downside pullbacks; SHORT on seasonal downtrends with upside pullbacks). Used sma_20 as proxy for 20-bar trend verification and rsi_14 extremes as proxy for oversold/overbought counter-trend signals. Stop loss calculated as 1.5 ATR ≈ 3% of typical price movement. Hold period set to 10 bars per exit condition. Critical semantic loss: the signal's predictive power depends on seasonal calendar alignment and multi-bar pullback structure, neither of which can be expressed in this rule engine without cyclical/temporal pattern indicators.
